problem: Why do perovskite solar cells degrade — what material instability causes it?
mechanism: Atomic layer deposition of conformal coating
hypothesis: If Atomic layer deposition of conformal coating is applied to instability, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Synthesis and characterization with 23 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
